matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Ripley's Aquarium

node.name: Ripley's Aquarium
node.description: World-class aquarium with underwater tunnel and interactive exhibits. Indoor family attraction perfect for kids. Sharks, jellyfish, and touch tanks.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 8 > Niagara Falls Day Trip

node.name: Niagara Falls Day Trip
node.description: Full-day excursion to Niagara Falls. Includes bus transportation, Hornblower boat ride, and time_block to explore the falls. Outdoor scenic adventure, weather dependent.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 9 > Queen Street West Boutiques

node.name: Queen Street West Boutiques
node.description: Eclectic shopping district with independent boutiques, vintage stores, and Canadian designers. Outdoor walking and browsing experience.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 3 > Art Gallery of Ontario

node.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
node.description: World-class art museum with Canadian and international collections. Indoor cultural experience in Frank Gehry-designed building. Quiet and contemplative atmosphere.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Royal Ontario Museum

node.name: Royal Ontario Museum
node.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history. Indoor cultural experience with dinosaurs, gems, and world cultures exhibits.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 6 > Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride

node.name: Toronto Islands Ferry and Bike Ride
node.description: Ferry ride to Toronto Islands followed by bike rental and exploration. Outdoor nature activity with beaches, gardens, and stunning skyline views. Perfect for families and kids.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > CN Tower EdgeWalk

node.name: CN Tower EdgeWalk
node.description: Thrilling hands-free walk around the outside of CN Tower at 356 meters. Unique bucket-list experience with stunning views. Memorable and unforgettable adventure.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 1 > Harbourfront Stroll

node.name: Harbourfront Stroll
node.description: Easy, relaxing walk along the waterfront. Low-energy activity perfect for recovering from travel_method. Beautiful lake views and fresh air.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 7 > Distillery District Walk

node.name: Distillery District Walk
node.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets, artisan shops, and galleries. Outdoor walking experience through restored Victorian industrial architecture.

matched_nodes.tree_path: Root > Itinerary_Version 1 > Itinerary > Day 10 > YYZ Departure

node.name: YYZ Departure
node.description: Flight departure from Toronto Pearson International Airport. End of trip.
